records.evidence: Top-left square preview object with no visible caption; geometry edit X58->X68 was proven writable.
Small top-centre object visibly contains a numeric/glyph area in the embedded preview.
Top-right rectangular preview object has no clearly readable dynamic value or button shading.
Mid-left object has button-style border and a short centred caption in the preview.
Large bottom-right button-form object is positioned like a navigation control.

safety_rule: Do not serialize object type, PLC address, caption, or action fields from this inventory until each provisional classification is verified with a one-property DOPSoft sample.
